function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Invoice bundle request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to the Helios tax-firm client (Claudia Reiter).

Best,
Assistant

next_step.current_state: Outbound email draft was written once as required. Verification: attachment path was previously read; single-item attachment list trivially satisfies newest-first; recipient matches canonical Miles email; subject value with colon+space was quoted. Proceeding to clean up processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md with one invoice attachment.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to handle next inbox item. I processed the lowest inbox file, verified sender identity canonically, resolved the tax-firm client entity, identified the oldest linked invoice from canonical invoice evidence, created one outbound draft email with that single attachment, and deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: request was for oldest 1 invoice, and exactly 1 was attached. No missing-file ambiguity remained.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request end-to-end and removed the handled inbox file.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a draft reply to the verified sender with the oldest single invoice linked to the tax-firm client, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS and relevant workflows before action, used inbox header as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, performed read-before-delete for inbox cleanup, and used single-write outbox discipline.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file requested a reply with the oldest 1 invoice linked to the tax-firm client. Canonical entity files verified sender (miles@novak.example) and identified the client (Claudia Reiter at helios-tax). The selected invoice file shows related_entity Claudia Reiter and issue date 2025-12-11, making it the oldest among Helios-linked invoices found. Request was completed by drafting the reply and deleting the processed inbox file.
